description: You are a real estate agent at Coldwell Banker preparing for a busy Saturday of property showings across the greater metro area. Your brokerage requires you to configure Sygic GPS Navigation with specific settings before your first showing. Set the Home address to '1600 Pennsylvania Avenue, Washington DC' and the Work address to 'Empire State Building, New York'. Add a gas station as a Favorite location to facilitate quick fuel stops. Configure the navigation to use the 'Shortest route' computation, enable 'Arrive in driving direction' to ensure correct property approach, and switch the color scheme to 'Night mode' to reduce glare during evening showings.
